channel.title: NetNewsWire Betas
channel.description: Most recent NetNewsWire changes with links to updates.

item.title: NetNewsWire 7.1b6
item.description:
• Exclude dinosaurs that have no articles in the database — we might just not have those articles yet
  • Make Dinosaurs window text field live (don’t require committing editing)

item.title: NetNewsWire 6.2.1
item.description:
Changes since 6.2:

  • Fixed some crashing bugs
  • Fixed a bug where, on some Macs, the user couldn’t select an OPML file to import
